headline: How Fifth Third grew embedded banking fee revenue 53% in 2025
summary: The Cincinnati bank's Newline business is now its fastest growing commercial payments segment.

headline: Regional Banks Stocks Q4 Recap: Benchmarking Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) and its peers.
